content: Rosa - the times here read 12:30/4:00 but the Eventbrite page says 1:00/4:30. Which one should we use for outreach?
Yvette, thanks - the event page is the authoritative source (1:00 setup, 4:30 program). I'll walk this with Rosa and update the bulletin before Sunday.
Thank you, Father. Mei and I will be there.
